brand.name: Twin Cities Insurance
brand.location: Twin Cities Metro Area (Minneapolis & Saint Paul, Minnesota)

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-light tracking-tight text-white
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-normal tracking-tight text-white
hierarchy.label: text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#94A3B8]

surfaces.glass_card: bg-[#0B0F19]/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-[#3B82F6] rounded-2xl shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)]
surfaces.glass_modal: bg-[#0B0F19]/90 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-[#3B82F6]/50 rounded-3xl shadow-[0_24px_64px_rgba(0,0,0,0.6)]

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous padding, p-6 to p-12 inside containers.
spacing_and_layout.page_layout: 40% hero section, 60% portfolio grid below it.

motion.3d_hero: Subtle cursor-tracked Y-axis rotation on the limousine model using framer-motion-3d or @react-spring/three. Continuous floating effect for badges.

section_1_hero.3d_specs: Low-poly limousine using Three.js primitives (BoxGeometry, CylinderGeometry), glossy metallic black material (MeshPhysicalMaterial with high metalness/low roughness), electric blue rim light (PointLight or SpotLight). No external GLB.
badges: Direct MnDOT Form E Filing Integration

content.headline: Minnesota's Premier Livery & Limousine Insurance
content.subheadline: Guaranteed $1.5M liability limits, instant MnDOT Form E filings, premium physical damage protection.

section_2_portfolio.card_style: Dark mode glassmorphic cards with 1px electric blue border. Use Lucide icons matching each coverage type (e.g., Briefcase, Shield, Car, Home).

steps.name: Risk Selection
steps.inputs: Grid options: [Limousine/Livery Fleet], [Small Business Lines], [Home & Auto Bundle]

steps.name: Business Details
steps.inputs: Legal Business Name, Minnesota Zip Code, optional DOT Number

section_3_modal.success_state: Application Received Securely. Principal Agent Muhammad Umar Ahmadzai is reviewing...

section_4_footer.content: Phone: 612-222-1749 | Email: mumerahmadzai@gmail.com — Minnesota Dept of Commerce compliance text.
section_4_footer.style: py-12 border-t border-white/10 text-sm text-[#94A3B8] text-center

testing.requirements: All interactive elements, forms, and cards MUST include data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure the hero uses ONLY Three.js primitives for the limousine. Use a Group of BoxGeometries and CylinderGeometries for the body and wheels. Add a blue PointLight for the rim light effect.
Do NOT use external images or 3D models; everything must be generated natively via code.
Apply data-testid to the CTA button, modal inputs, modal steps, and portfolio cards.
The multi-step modal must use framer-motion for smooth step transitions.
Ensure the application layout strictly follows: 40% height for Hero and 60% for the Portfolio Grid below it.
